channel.title: Game Changer Animated
channel.description: Latest releases from Game Changer Animated on Dropout.tv

item.title: I'm a Professional
item.description:
The devious Tina explains her evil plans to rule Mountport. Accompaniment by Scott Passarella. Animated by Trevor Dedekind and Alex Dron.

Duration: 02:19

Tags: Game Changer Animated, Game Changer, animation, game shows, challenges, competitions, improv, surprises, mad skills, unscripted, musicals, singing, zeke nicholson, zach reino, jessica mckenna, scott passarella, yukfoo animation, trevor dedekind, alex dron
